positive: A retro-futuristic scene of a floating diner on a desert mesa, inspired by 1970s psychedelic posters and mid-century Americana. Warm, muted colors, grainy film texture, vintage screen print aesthetic, vaporwave influences.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, modern digital art, neon glow, hyperrealism
